news.title: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed Governor Lisa Cook for now
news.summary: Lisa Cook will remain as a Federal Reserve governor as her lawsuit challenging Trump's effort to fire her proceeds. The ruling by the Supreme Court means that Lisa Cook will continue to serve as a Fed governor.

news.title: Comcast jumps 9% after announcing it will spin off NBCUniversal and Sky from cable business
news.summary: Comcast said it will separate into two publicly traded companies through a tax-free spinoff of NBCUniversal and Sky. Comcast: It will be a 'separate but equal' company.

news.title: Alphabet stock pops 4% on Dow debut, but the tech giant faces major AI questions
news.summary: Alphabet shares rose Monday as the company joined the Dow, but the blue-chip milestone comes as the stock remains under pressure. The stock rose 1.7% Monday.

news.title: This insurance stock is on an impressive run. How to ride the momentum with less risk
news.summary: MetLife is exhibiting fundamental momentum that the broader market hasn't fully priced in. MetLife is well-positioned in the life insurance and benefits sector.

news.title: Trump bought as much as $5 million in Axon stock before ICE sought $220 million Taser deal
news.summary: Axon Enterprise has ramped up lobbying in Congress on federal law enforcement technology. ICE pursues a potential $220 million Taser deal.

news.title: Fed’s Lisa Cook can stay on at central bank while challenging Trump’s attempt to fire her, Supreme Court rules
news.summary: The Supreme Court has refused to allow President Donald Trump to fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook. The move strengthens the independence of the central bank.

news.title: I’m a CPA and tell my clients to claim Social Security early. Am I giving them bad advice?
news.summary: Only 8% to 10% of people wait until age 70 to claim. “Only 8-10% of the people I know wait to claim until they are 70,” he says.

news.title: Wall Street is bracing for a wave of Fed rate hikes that may never come. These sectors stand to gain.
news.summary: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh looks less hawkish than advertised. Inflation isn’t as high as you think — and Fed Chair Warsh is not a hawk.

news.title: There’s a ‘Trump account’ hack that can unlock decades of wealth-building for your kid
news.summary: The only reason to use these accounts is “if you’re planning to do the Roth strategy,” says one financial planner.

news.title: Strategy can now sell bitcoin to buy back stock — the opposite of what it’s been doing
news.summary: Strategy disclosed a program to sell bitcoin “from time to time” to fund its U.S. dollar reserve and share repurchases.
